conservative.name: Clarity of Eagles
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. Targets a battle happening right now within about 100 miles

success.description: You look down upon a battle, watching it unfold

boon.description: You can whisper advice to commanders or warriors participating in the battle. Whenever such a character performs an action, you may remove 1 recharge token from this blessing to add or to that action's dice pool

bane.description: While this blessing is recharging, you can no longer see with your own eyes or hear with your own ears
